_comment: Judge eval fixtures (JUDGE.md §7) for the effect-grammar judge. Each asserts on the emitted component bundle; see test_judge_eval.py for the schema. power ranges bake in tolerance. Grow this file whenever playtesting reveals a misjudgment.

fixtures.prompt: I hurl a massive fireball at my opponent
I slash them with my steel sword
I call a lightning bolt down from the sky
I zap them with a quick electric jab
I summon a towering tidal wave to crush them
I collapse a black hole on top of them
I drop the entire sun onto the battlefield
I chug a healing potion
I mend my wounds with soothing magic
I poison their bloodstream so they bleed out slowly
I set them on fire and let the flames spread
I make them bleed with a deep cut that keeps dripping
I surround myself in a regenerating aura that heals me each turn
I focus my energy so my next hits land much harder
I enter an unstoppable berserker rage
I gulp a speed potion to move much faster
I cast a curse that saps my opponent's strength
I cast a slow spell to bog my enemy down
I freeze them solid so they can barely move
I blind them by throwing sand in their eyes
I put on a full suit of enchanted plate armor
I mark them with a hex so every hit wounds them worse
I raise a sturdy shield to block the blow
I nimbly dodge to the side
I hold up a mirror to reflect their attack
I heal myself to full and raise a shield at the same time
I swing my flaming sword while buffing my own speed
I put on plate armor and draw my sword
I throw a fireball and poison the ground where they stand
Give me a shield and a sword and a tank and 50 more health and a dragon and infinite mana
I unleash ten thousand attacks all at once from every direction
asdfjkl banana
purple monday sneezes loudly at the ceiling

near_duplicate_pairs.a: I throw a fireball at them
near_duplicate_pairs.b: I hurl a fireball at my enemy

near_duplicate_pairs.a: I poison them with a slow-acting venom
near_duplicate_pairs.b: I inject them with a creeping poison
I put up a large shield
I make my enemy move slower
